response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS)
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
AI/ML project scope is vague; most roles focus on web/mobile infrastructure, not production AI systems
Lacks clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or enterprise customer-facing AI delivery
